summary: PWA, Guardian Management, and Push Notification infrastructure tested. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for all new screens.

PWA_Static_Files.manifest.json_content: PASS - Has name='Nagarik', start_url='/m/home', display='standalone', icons (192x192, 512x512)
PWA_Static_Files.sw.js_content: PASS - Has install, activate, fetch, push event handlers

Guardian_Network_API.GET /api/guardian-network/: PASS - Returns guardians array with total count

UI_Tests.MobileGuardians_list: PASS - 6 guardian cards displayed with escalation numbers (1-6)
UI_Tests.MobileGuardians_buttons: PASS - Add guardian button, remove buttons, set-primary buttons present
UI_Tests.MobileGuardians_primary_badge: PASS - Crown icon visible for primary guardian
UI_Tests.MobileGuardians_contacts_link: PASS - Emergency Contacts link at bottom
UI_Tests.MobileAddGuardian_form: PASS - Email input, Name input, relationship grid (6 types), primary toggle, submit button
UI_Tests.MobileContacts_buttons: PASS - Edit and delete buttons for each contact
UI_Tests.MobileContacts_add_form: PASS - Name, Phone, Relationship inputs, Save button

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
Guardian escalation order displayed correctly (1-6 numbering)
PWA manifest has all required fields for installability
Service worker handles install, activate, fetch, and push events
FCM push notifications are MOCKED (stored but not sent via FCM - requires Firebase config)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test guardians and emergency contacts created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA, Guardian Management, and Push Notification infrastructure fully implemented. PWA has manifest.json, sw.js, and all meta tags. Guardian Network has CRUD operations at /api/guardian-network/ and emergency contacts at /api/guardian-network/emergency-contacts. Device registration at /api/device/register. FCM push is MOCKED - stores notifications but doesn't send via FCM (requires Firebase credentials).

mocked_features.FCM_Push_Notifications: Notifications are stored in push_notifications table but not actually sent via FCM (Firebase credentials not configured). The notification_service.py stores notifications but fcm_available=false.
